skill.name: longbridge-quant
skill.description:
Quantitative strategy frameworks: pairs trading/cointegration, volatility regime strategies, seasonality/calendar effects, multi-factor models (IC/IR), factor research and screening, correlation analysis, statistical methods (ADF/GARCH), strategy optimization, execution modeling, hedging, and ML-based prediction (sklearn). Also provides CLI access to run indicator scripts against K-line data.
Triggers: "量化", "因子", "配对交易", "协整", "波动率策略", "季节性", "多因子", "IC", "机器学习", "对冲", "量化策略", "協整", "波動率策略", "季節性", "多因子", "對沖", "quant", "pairs trading", "cointegration", "volatility strategy", "seasonality", "multi-factor", "factor model", "IC IR", "machine learning", "hedging", "walk-forward", "配對交易", "機器學習", "因子選股"
skill.summary: Quantitative analysis frameworks (pairs trading, factor models, hedging, ML strategies) plus a CLI for running indicator scripts against K-line data.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: The skill is a prompt-only documentation skill describing quantitative trading frameworks. All 264 static findings are false positives: backtick code blocks in markdown are CLI usage examples (not Ruby/shell execution), and terms like 'hash', 'window', and 'sampling' are used in their financial/statistical sense, not in any malicious or cryptographic context. No scripts, network calls, or sensitive data access are present.

low_findings.title: CLI subprocess usage documented in skill
low_findings.description: The skill describes running the `longbridge` CLI to fetch K-line data and execute quant indicator scripts. All invocations are user-initiated against the official Longbridge CLI, not embedded shell injection.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: CLI usage is the primary instruction surface (per CLAUDE.md), and flags are discovered via --help at runtime — no hard-coded injection vectors.

content.value_statement: Quantitative traders and analysts need a consistent framework for backtesting factor models, pairs trading, and ML-based signals. This skill provides ready-made analytical frameworks plus a CLI to run indicator scripts against historical K-line data.
actual_capabilities: Pairs trading and cointegration analysis (Engle-Granger, Johansen, Z-score, half-life)
Volatility regime strategy design (20/60-day HV, percentile rank, long/short-vol signals)
Seasonality and calendar effect analysis (month-of-year, day-of-week, pre-holiday drift)
Multi-factor model construction (value, momentum, quality, low-vol) with Z-score composites
Factor research with IC/IR analysis, factor decay, and layer backtest
Statistical methods including ADF unit-root test, GARCH, and bootstrap
Strategy optimization with parameter sweep, walk-forward validation, overfitting detection
Execution cost modeling (slippage, VWAP/TWAP, market impact)
Hedging strategy design (beta hedging, options protection, tail-risk hedging)
ML-based prediction with rolling walk-forward Random Forest and Gradient Boosting
limitations: Analytical and backtest-only — does not execute live trades
Requires `longbridge-terminal` CLI installed for K-line data and quant run commands
Historical K-line data is limited to 500 trading days for backtest
ML strategy uses sklearn only; does not include deep learning frameworks

use_cases.title: Backtest a pairs trading strategy
use_cases.description: Design a cointegration-based pairs trading strategy with Z-score entry/exit and half-life estimation.

use_cases.title: Research alpha factors with IC/IR
use_cases.description: Evaluate factor effectiveness using IC, IR, and decay analysis on a stock universe.

use_cases.title: Build a multi-factor stock selection model
use_cases.description: Combine value, momentum, quality, and low-vol factors into a Z-score composite portfolio.

prompt_templates.title: Basic indicator script
prompt_templates.prompt: Run a Pine Script moving-average indicator on TSLA.US daily K-line for 2024 and output JSON.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick start — run a simple indicator

prompt_templates.title: Pairs trading analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Find cointegrated pairs from a watchlist, compute hedge ratio via OLS, and generate Z-score entry/exit signals with half-life of mean reversion.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-factor model
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a multi-factor model with value (1/PE, 1/PB), momentum (60-day), quality (ROE), and low-vol (60-day HV). Combine via Z-score, select top 20 stocks.

prompt_templates.title: ML-based prediction with walk-forward
prompt_templates.prompt: Train a Random Forest with rolling walk-forward validation using 20-day momentum, RSI, and volume features. Output signal and OOS Sharpe ratio.

output_examples.input: Find cointegrated pairs from NVDA.US and AMD.US daily data for 2024
output: Cointegration test (Engle-Granger): p-value 0.023 — pair is cointegrated
Script executed server-side, indicator values returned as JSON
Sample output: [{timestamp, open, high, low, close, ma20, ma60}]

best_practices: Always run `longbridge <subcommand> --help` first to discover current flags before invoking the CLI
Use --format json output for downstream AI agent processing and scripting
Validate strategies with walk-forward optimization and check IS/OOS Sharpe degradation
anti_patterns: Do not hard-code specific subcommand names or flag names in workflows — the CLI evolves
Do not run strategies on insufficient history — ADF tests need at least 50 observations
Do not treat backtest Sharpe as a guarantee of future performance — always check OOS degradation

faq.question: Is login required to use the quant CLI?
faq.answer: No. The `longbridge quant` command is public and does not require authentication.

faq.question: What script language does the quant CLI accept?
faq.answer: The quant run subcommand executes a Pine Script V6-compatible indicator syntax server-side and returns JSON.

faq.question: How much historical K-line data is available?
faq.answer: Up to 500 trading days of daily OHLCV data is available for backtesting.

faq.question: Can I execute live trades with this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill is analytical and backtest-only. It does not place or manage live orders.

faq.question: What happens if `longbridge` is not installed?
faq.answer: Install `longbridge-terminal`, or use the Longbridge MCP server for K-line data if the CLI binary is unavailable.

faq.question: Does the ML strategy include deep learning?
faq.answer: No. The ML strategy uses scikit-learn (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting). Deep learning frameworks are not included.
